context: Tests whether the agent designs a BLE onboarding flow using AccessorySetupKit rather than broad CoreBluetooth discovery, with correct plist declarations, descriptor setup, session lifecycle, picker timing, and post-selection handoff.

checklist.name: Uses ASK
checklist.description: Uses AccessorySetupKit and ASAccessorySession for initial discovery and authorization rather than direct CoreBluetooth scanning.

checklist.name: Bluetooth plist
checklist.description: Declares Bluetooth service and name discovery values that match the sensor service UUID and EnviroTag name rule.

checklist.name: Descriptor UUID
checklist.description: Creates an ASDiscoveryDescriptor using the provided Bluetooth service UUID.

checklist.name: Descriptor name
checklist.description: Adds Bluetooth name matching for EnviroTag or an equivalent substring/prefix rule.

checklist.name: Activated first
checklist.description: Activates ASAccessorySession and treats the activated event as the safe point for reading existing accessories or presenting setup.

checklist.name: User action
checklist.description: Presents the picker from an explicit Add Sensor user action, not automatically on app launch.

checklist.name: Dismissal order
checklist.description: Stores the selected accessory on accessoryAdded and starts the in-app calibration step only after pickerDidDismiss.

checklist.name: Bluetooth handoff
checklist.description: Uses ASAccessory.bluetoothIdentifier with CoreBluetooth after selection to retrieve/connect the peripheral.

checklist.name: Permission note
checklist.description: Explains that AccessorySetupKit-only discovery avoids a broad Bluetooth permission prompt and limits CoreBluetooth scan results to paired accessories.
